articles.title: Claude Fable 5 brings Mythos to the masses — Anthropic's new frontier model is 'state-of-the-art on nearly all tested benchmarks'
articles.summary: After first announcing its scarily capable Mythos Preview model back in April, Anthropic is releasing a public version of Mythos, called Fable 5, that it says is "safe for general use."

articles.summary_zh: 幾週前才表示其 Mythos 模型強大到不能發佈的公司，現在說我們可能需要按下暫停鍵。

articles.title: Rethinking the Logic-Routing Tradeoff in FPGAs

One of those features is called Call Context, and it’ll make everyones phone calls to customer support substantially easier. more…

articles.title: Anthropic just released public Mythos-class AI model called Claude Fable, details here
articles.summary: Back in April, Anthropic unveiled its Claude Mythos AI model that it said was too powerful to publicly release. Instead, the company has shared access with software vendors, including Apple, in an effort to use the model for enhanced cybersecurity. Now, as promised, Anthropic has released what it calls a Mythos-class model that customers can actually use. The new model is called Claude Fable. more…
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 發布公開 Mythos 級 AI 模型 Claude Fable，詳情如下
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 現已如承諾般發布了 Claude Mythos AI 模型的公開版本，用於增強網路安全。

articles.title: Nomad debuts limited edition Stand One in color-matching Stellar Orange
articles.summary: The Cosmic Orange iPhone 17 Pro has been my favorite color variation in years. I love how the color just pops. I even recently wrote about my Cosmic Orange-themed everyday carry. The Cosmic Orange color-matching continues with Nomad’s limited-edition Stellar Orange Stand One charger. This charger is awesome for so many reasons, but it all starts with the design and materials they chose to make a premium, well-built product that just happens to perfectly match my iPhone. Here is what you need to know! more…

articles.title: Google One might be my most valuable tech subscription – thanks and no thanks to AI
articles.summary: Google One has long been offered as a way to expand the storage across products like Drive, Gmail, and Photos, but Google has been pivoting it towards a focus on AI. And while that’s compelling for some, the real value in Google’s AI storage subscriptions is now coming from everything else – and it’s simply one of the best deals in tech today. more…
articles.title_zh: Google One 可能是我最有價值的科技訂閱——感謝和不感謝 AI

articles.summary: As AI models get more powerful, there’s also going to be a level of danger. Anthropic announced Mythos not long ago as a model that was too dangerous for public availability, but a new version of that, Claude Fable 5, is now available and, apparently, “safe for general use.” more…

articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出的 Claude Fable 5 是 Mythos 的公開版本，號稱「安全供一般使用」，具備強大的能力。

articles.title: Anthropic’s too-scary-to-release AI hacking tool is actually coming out — kind of
articles.summary: TL;DR Anthropic is releasing a pair of its most powerful models to date with Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5. While Mythos 5 is built to let security researchers discover vulnerabilities, the public Fable 5 has safeguards to prevent hacking. Both models show advanced capabilities for tackling even highly complex analytical tasks. By now, you’ve almost certainly seen at least one AI demo that left you feeling a little off-kilter — “That’s not just good; that’s scarily good.” Whether we’re talking about AI stealing jobs from artists, or generating novel proofs for mathematical mysteries, we’re constantly finding new ways where AI-powered systems deliver results that make them seem almost uncomfortably powerful. Recently, we’ve heard Anthropic sharing its concerns about releasing its latest Claud
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 過於危險而無法發布的 AI 駭客工具實際上即將推出——某種程度上
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 發布迄今最強大的兩個模型 Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，其中 Mythos 5 用於安全研究，Fable 5 具備駭客防護。

articles.title: Google Translate and Meet are getting a big-time language translation boost
articles.summary: Credit: Stephen Headrick TL;DR Google has announced the release of Gemini 3.5 Live Translate. This model will power speech translation in Google Meet later this year. The model is also rolling out globally to the Translate app on Android and iOS. The day that we can have seamless, real-time conversations regardless of language barriers feels like it just got a whole lot closer. Google has announced the release of Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, its latest live audio speech-to-speech translation model. And it won’t be long before you can start using it. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google Translate 和 Meet 獲得大幅語言翻譯提升
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 模型，將在今年晚些時候為 Google Meet 提供語音翻譯，並已在 Android 和 iOS Translate 應用全球推出。

articles.title: AI Mode in Google Search will soon let everyone build interactive diagrams for free
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google is updating the AI Mode experience in Search for all users. Soon, everyone will have access to interactive visuals in AI Mode. The feature will be widely available this summer, free of charge. When attempting to learn something, sometimes going hands-on with a visual aid can make a world of difference. Late last year, Google introduced an interactive images feature to Gemini just for that purpose. It then took that a step further by rolling out interactive simulations and models. Soon, you’ll be able to do something similar in Search. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google Search 的 AI Mode 即將讓所有人免費建立互動圖表
articles.summary_zh: Google 正在為所有使用者更新 Search 中的 AI Mode 體驗。今年夏天，所有人都可以免費使用 AI Mode 中的互動視覺化功能。

articles.title: Is your YouTube Shorts ‘Dislike’ button missing? Here’s what’s going on
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Hindy / Android Authority TL;DR YouTube appears to be running a new test for Shorts. The experiment replaces the like button with a heart button. It’s also said to move the dislike button to the three-dot menu. Remember when YouTube removed the dislike counter on videos? As the company explained, the decision was made after running an experiment to reduce harrassment and dislike attacks. It looks like YouTube may now be running a similar test for Shorts, but this one goes one step further. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 你的 YouTube Shorts「不喜歡」按鈕不見了嗎？原因在這裡
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 正在對 Shorts 進行新的測試，將「讚」按鈕替換為心形按鈕，並將「不喜歡」按鈕移至三點選單中。

articles.title: Survey shows a surprising number of you still carry a torch for this two-year-old Samsung phone
articles.summary: The Moto G Stylus (2026) is a good phone, but it costs $100 more than the previous model while offering few substantial year-over-year changes. Its increased $500 price tag puts it in competition with some pretty great phones from Samsung, Google, and others. In a poll, we asked which of our favorite G Stylus competitors you think is the best alternative. Our poll laid out five options you can get for around the latest G Stylus’s price: last year’s Moto G Stylus, the Google Pixel 10a, the Nothing Phone 4a Pro, the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, and the 2025 Moto Razr. Despite being a couple of years old, the Galaxy S24 Ultra won by a pretty wide margin.
articles.title_zh: 調查顯示仍有驚人數量的人喜愛這款兩年前的 Samsung 手機
articles.summary_zh: Moto G Stylus (2026) 是一款不錯的手機，但價格比前代高出 $100，而年度改進卻不多。其 $500 的定價使其與 Samsung、Google 等品牌的優秀手機競爭。

articles.title: Honor adds Virtual Permissions feature to MagicOS that protects your private data
articles.summary: Ever had to grant permissions you don't really want to give a certain app to use it? For instance, when you are asked to give access to your call history or messages just to be able to use a fitness app. Well, Honor has a solution for that and calls it Virtual Permissions. Virtual Permissions is a feature coming to MagicOS devices this month that allows you to grant blank permissions to apps you don't trust. When enabled for select apps in the settings menu, the system will give empty data - blank call logs, messages, false camera access, etc. Since Honor is doing this on a...
articles.title_zh: Honor 在 MagicOS 中新增 Virtual Permissions 功能以保護隱私數據
articles.summary_zh: Honor 推出了 Virtual Permissions 功能，解決使用者需要授予不想給予的應用程式權限的問題，例如為了使用健身應用而被迫授予通話記錄或訊息存取權限。

articles.title: Samsung is already working on Galaxy A18 firmware builds
articles.summary: Samsung is currently working on the Galaxy A18 4G, in fact the company is already developing test firmware for the device as you can see in the screenshot below which originates on Samsung's test server for Europe. The phone will have the model number SM-A185F. Interestingly, because Samsung is using the SHA256 hash for these builds instead of the older MD5 format, the Galaxy A18 4G may launch with One UI 9 on board from day one. If that's the case, then it will only get official in late summer or in the fall, since One UI 9 is expected to make its debut next month on the company's...
articles.title_zh: Samsung 已在開發 Galaxy A18 韌體版本
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 目前正在開發 Galaxy A18 4G，該公司已在歐洲測試伺服器上進行測試韌體開發，型號為 SM-A185F。

articles.title: Opera for Android updated with a new start page and football hub
articles.summary: Opera has updated its mobile browser on Android with a new design as well as a specialized hub for the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup matches. Starting with the design, the new Opera for Android features a design that is very much based on Chrome for Android. articles.summary: The upcoming Samsung Galaxy S27 has now been spotted in the GSM Association's IMEI database. This confirms its name and its model number, that is SM-S952 with a letter affixed to that, which signifies which market(s) it's intended for. The specific model in the IMEI database is the SM-S952U, as you can see in the screenshot below. This one is going to US carriers. Of course, having this confirmation that the Galaxy S27 is actually in development, and will be sold in the US through the big three carriers, is anything but surprising. And yet, it's nice to have, as the IMEI database...

articles.title: Apple launches personalized recommendations for the App Store
articles.summary: At its Worldwide Developers Conference, Apple announced a new feature coming to its App Store: Personalized Collections. In fact, these are app and game recommendations tailored to you. They will be based on your interests, and will come with App Notes that explain why specific apps are recommended. The tailored recommendations can appear on the Apps, Games, and Search tabs, and they will evolve over time based on your app usage and downloads. Personalized Collections will start rolling out this week in English in the US. Apple promises they will work in more languages and more regions...

articles.summary: Google scored a big victory yesterday as its Gemini model became the foundation of Apple’s new Siri. But the tech giant is pushing even harder to grab as much market share during the AI boom as possible – it just made its base AI plan cheaper. Google AI Plus used to be $8 a month and came with 200GB of storage. The monthly price has been reduced to $5 or the local equivalent, wrote Vikas Kansal on his X account (Kansal is the Product lead for Google AI subscriptions). articles.title: TrendForce: global smartphone market declined 1.7% in Q1, things will get worse later this year
articles.summary: 284 million smartphones were produced globally in the first three months of 2026, a decline of 1.7% compared to the same period last year, reports TrendForce. The impact of increasing memory prices was minimal, but only because manufacturers had stockpiles of cheap memory available – those are gradually being exhausted. For the full year 2026, the analysts’ prediction is dire – 1.051 billion units produced or 16.2% less than last year. And this is the good option as TrendForce notes: “the annual decline could become even more pronounced if memory price increases remain elevated and brands...

See what’s new in Claude Fable 5 Fable 5 is designed for long-running, multi-stage, and asynchronous tasks like complex code refactoring, deep research synthesis, and document-heavy workflows. This elevated level of autonomy changes what teams can ask AI to do. Enterprises can now delegate sophisticated multi-turn projects to agents, enabling them to reason over your organization’s data to solve real problems. For enterprises, this frontier capability is only part of the equation. To tur

articles.title: Git real: AI agents aren’t just for solo developers anymore
articles.summary: In the first week of June, three vendors pushed coding agents past the single-developer loop. Cognition released Devin Desktop on June 2. The same day, Microsoft used Build 2026 to introduce Rayfin . And Augment Code announced Cosmos for every team plan on June 3. The three launches sit at different layers of the same emerging stack: Devin Desktop gives a team a single console to manage them. Rayfin governs which agent-built apps deploy into the enterprise. Cosmos coordinates a fleet of agents. Taken as a whole, the three mark a shift: The coding agent is becoming team infrastructure rather than a personal tool. It is a pattern is familiar to anyone who watched source control grow up. Version control began as a private convenience on one workstation, and then Git and continuous integration
articles.title_zh: 真正的 Git：AI 智能體不再只是單個開發者的工具
articles.summary_zh: 在六月第一週，三家廠商將代碼智能體推進到多開發者場景。Cognition 於 6 月 2 日推出 Devin Desktop，Microsoft 在 Build 2026 上推出 Rayfin，Augment Code 於 6 月 3 日宣布 Cosmos 團隊計劃。

articles.title: Anthropic launches Claude Mythos/Fable 5, but you better try it soon
articles.summary: On Tuesday, Anthropic launched Fable 5, its first generally available Mythos-class model. Fable 5 is essentially the highly capable Mythos model the company has been talking about for the last few weeks, but with guardrails in place to ensure that it can’t be misused to build malware or bioweapons, for example. To complicate matters, the company also launched Mythos 5, an updated version of Mythos without some of these guardrails, but it will initially be available only to members of Project Glasswing . Fable 5 availability: the first one is always free Unlike Mythos, though, you can use Fable 5 today. Anthropic says it’s now available in the API (and on Microsoft Foundry, Amazon Bedrock, and the Claude Platform on AWS ) for $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million outp
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Mythos/Fable 5，但你最好盡快試用
articles.summary_zh: 本週二，Anthropic 推出 Fable 5，這是其首個正式推出的 Mythos 級模型。Fable 5 本質上是該公司在過去幾週談論的高性能 Mythos 模型，但加入了防護措施以防止其被濫用開發惡意軟體或生物武器。

articles.title: Spring is 23 years old. AI just made it a security emergency.
articles.summary: AI is rewriting the rules of software security , and the Java ecosystem — the backbone of enterprise computing for more than 30 years — is feeling it in real time. Broadcom  is the steward of the open-source  Spring Framework and announced Monday what it’s calling the largest set of Spring security updates to be open-sourced in the framework’s 23-year history. The company is also bringing its SLSA Level 3-validated, clean-room-built Java dependencies to the entire Spring ecosystem for enterprise Tanzu Spring customers, who will also get day-zero access to CVE -only patches before they reach the open source community. The motivation is clear: Monthly security advisories reported to Broadcom by the Spring community jumped more than 1,700% from March to April
articles.title_zh: Spring 已有 23 年歷史。AI 使其成為安全緊急情況。
articles.summary_zh: AI 正在改寫軟件安全規則，作為企業計算支柱超過 30 年的 Java 生態系統正在實時感受這一影響。Broadcom 作為開源 Spring Framework 的管理者於週一宣布稱為最大級別的安全漏洞。

articles.title: Meta Partners With Reliance on First India AI Data Center

articles.title: Einride Joins US-Listed Driverless Trucking Rivals on Nasdaq

articles.title: Bizlink Said to Near Deal to Buy Blackstone’s Interplex Unit

articles.title: Fmr. Australian Ambo to US on Geopolitics
articles.summary:
Dennis Richardson, former Australian Ambassador to the US, discusses the future for Australia–US relations at a time of heightened geopolitical tensions and fragile global alliances amid trade strains.
He speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud Watts at the Morgan Stanley Australia summit in Sydney on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 前澳洲駐美大使談地緣政治
articles.summary_zh: 前澳洲駐美大使 Dennis Richardson 在摩根士丹利澳洲峰會上討論了在地緣政治局勢升溫和全球聯盟脆弱的時代澳洲與美國關係的未來。

articles.title: Singapore Court Moves to Seize Capital A’s Assets in Dispute
articles.summary: A Singapore court has moved to seize stakes in fintech firm Big Pay and logistics unit Teleport held by Capital A Bhd.’s Move Digital Sdn. to enforce an arbitration award stemming from a shareholder dispute.

articles.title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints

articles.title: Leonardo’s New CEO Sees Green Light for Space Venture Next Year

articles.title: Lumentum CEO: See Huge Opportunity for Optics Industry
articles.summary: Michael Hurlston, CEO of Lumentum, discussed the critical role of indium phosphide in optical chips, particularly lasers, which are essential for the AI revolution. He explained that the increasing speeds and bandwidth requirements in data centers are driving a shift toward optical connectivity using fiber optics, as light offers unmatched transmission speed. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Lumentum 首席執行官：光學業前景光明

articles.title: IBM CEO: AI Won’t Necessarily Lead To Smaller Headcount
articles.summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna discusses IBM's significant $10 billion investment in quantum computing, a faster form of AI. Krishna also noted a $1 billion federal government commitment to build a chip fabrication facility in Albany, New York, illustrating a strong collaboration between public and private sectors. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: IBM 首席執行官：AI 不一定導致人員減少

articles.title: FIS President & CEO: We’re All Part of an Integrated Ecosystem

She discusses the AI technology that her company uses, and the security measures in place to make sure that sensitive data is protected. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

She discusses how the adoption of AI can change the landscape of businesses, but also the economies of countries around the world. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 瑞銀投資主管：AI 正衝擊全球經濟每個部門
articles.summary_zh: 瑞銀美洲投資及公司銀行業務主管 Michal Katz 在瑞銀技術會議上討論了人工智能的未來及其如何改變企業和全球經濟格局。

articles.title: 'We Have To Prepare' for the AI Transition Says Gina Raimondo
articles.summary: Gina Raimondo, 40th Commerce Secretary joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the AI race, and its labor market impact. She said the US needs to lead the global AI race and that we should prepare all Americans in order to be successful as a nation. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 我們必須為 AI 轉型做準備，美國商務部長 Gina Raimondo 表示

articles.title: AI Use in Health Care 'Barely Scratching the Surface' Says Philips' Jeff DiLullo
articles.summary: Jeff DiLullo, CEO of Phillips North America, said that while a new report shows AI use by health care clinicians is ramping up, the industry has 'barely scratched the surface' of what new technology can achieve. DiLullo said that AI can improve both the quality of work and quality of life of doctors as it narrows down areas of focus and reduces burnout. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Philips CEO Jeff DiLullo 稱醫療保健中的 AI 應用「才剛剛開始」

articles.title: Robots Are Critical to US Manufacturing, Says Standard Bots CEO

Standard Bots co-founder and CEO, Evan Beard joins Caroline Hyde to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: OpenAI Joins Race for Public Market Cash

This comes as the AI IPO pipeline has now reached some $3.6 trillion. However, according to PitchBook research, OpenAI may end up being the most expensive bet. Harrison Rolfes, senior analyst for PitchBook's private company coverage, joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Starlink charges $10 monthly hardware fee in move away from one-time purchases
articles.summary: Starlink has started charging a $10 monthly rental fee for hardware in a shift away from its longtime practice of selling hardware to customers for a one-time charge. Starlink residential ordering pages now show an upfront hardware cost of $0 and a monthly kit fee of $10, similar to the hardware rental fees long charged by cable and telecom companies. Starlink hardware includes a terminal to receive satellite signals and a router to place in a user's home. The monthly kit fee is in addition to Internet service prices, which Starlink recently raised by $5 to $10 per month. Starlink is charging $55 a month for 100Mbps, $85 for 200Mbps, and $130 for the "Max" tier that can go up to 400Mbps. Starlink also provides a professional-installation service for a one-time fee of $199, or for no additi
articles.title_zh: Starlink 改變政策，對硬體開始收取 10 美元月費
articles.summary_zh: Starlink 開始對硬體收取 10 美元的月租費，改變了過去一次性出售硬體的做法，其住宅訂購頁面現在顯示初期硬體成本為 0 美元，月度套件費為 10 美元。

articles.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
articles.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday released fixes for two high-severity zero-days that were disclosed by a researcher who has been locked in a testy beef with the software giant. Nightmare Eclipse, the pseudonym the researcher goes by, released a handful of high-severity vulnerabilities in recent months, making them zero-days that had the potential to be exploited in the wild. The researcher has said the disclosures, which included proof-of-concept code, came after Microsoft reneged on an arrangement the two made regarding vulnerabilities they had discussed. Disclosure drama “But someone violated our agreement and left me homeless with nothing,” Nightmare Eclipse wrote in March. “They knew this will happen and they still stabbed me in the back anyways, this is their decision not mine.” Read full article
articles.title_zh: 與研究人員陷入激烈對立，Microsoft 修復所披露的 0-Day 漏洞
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 週二發布了針對兩個高嚴重性零日漏洞的修復，這些漏洞由與該公司陷入紛爭的研究人員披露。

articles.title: Three key vital signs make up the "urban pulse" of a city
articles.summary: People often speak metaphorically of the heartbeat or pulse of a city, but according to the authors of a new paper published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, cities do indeed have an "urban pulse"—an indication of urban "metabolic activity" that can be measured to suss out telltale patterns. And those patterns could help inform future public policy around urban planning. The precise definition of urbanization has shifted over the centuries. Zhe Zhu of the University of Connecticut and his fellow authors adopted a broad version for their study. It features fundamental "processes of concurrent change in at least six dimensions, including demography, economy, infrastructure, environment, governance and culture," they wrote. "Together they give rise to outcomes, measurab
articles.title_zh: 三個關鍵生命體徵構成城市的「城市脈動」
articles.summary_zh: 根據發表在《美國國家科學院院報》上的新論文，城市確實有一個「城市脈動」，可以測量以反映城市的「代謝活動」。

articles.title: Commonwealth Fusion makes the physics case for its 400 MW reactor
articles.summary: The scientific community has a plan for achieving fusion power. It involves getting a better understanding of how to control fusion in a tokamak-style reactor using the currently under construction ITER reactor , and then using that knowledge to build DEMO-style plants . But ITER isn't even expected to see hot plasmas until the middle of the 2030s, by which point solar panels will be so cheap that we'll probably all be getting them free in our cereal boxes. Commonwealth Fusion is a startup that's basically asking "what if we did that, but now?" Its ITER equivalent, a tokamak called SPARC, is over 70 percent complete and is planned to be operating as soon as next year. The company already has a site and customers for the power-generating follow-on, called ARC. Both of those projects are pre
articles.title_zh: Commonwealth Fusion 為其 400 MW 反應堆闡述物理學論證
articles.summary_zh: 科學界有一項實現核融合發電的計劃，涉及更好地理解如何在托卡馬克式反應堆中控制核融合，然後用該知識構建 DEMO 風格的電廠。

articles.title: Paramount accuses Netflix of "scorched-earth campaign" against WBD merger
articles.summary: Paramount Skydance is accusing Netflix of maintaining a campaign against its proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD). In a June 5 letter (PDF) addressed to Jared A. Hughes, acting section chief of the Media, Entertainment, and Communications Section of the US Department of Justice's (DOJ's) Antitrust Division, and A. Maya Kahn, a trial attorney for the Antitrust Division, and first reported on by Politico today, Paramount chief legal officer Makan Delrahim accused Netflix of trying to influence stakeholders about the merger. The letter reads: Indeed, Netflix’s panic-level response and scorched-earth campaign to try and poison regulators and other stakeholders against the Transaction shows just how seriously Netflix takes Paramount as a scaled competitor. The letter from Delrah
articles.title_zh: Paramount 指控 Netflix 對 WBD 併購進行「焦土戰役」
articles.summary_zh: Paramount Skydance 指控 Netflix 對其收購 Warner Bros. Discovery 的提議進行持續性遊說活動。

articles.title: Anthropic says these topics are too dangerous to let its Fable 5 model talk about
articles.summary: Anthropic Tuesday publicly released Claude Fable 5 , its first "Mythos-class" model that it says surpasses its previous frontier Opus models in overall capabilities. But the model's launch today comes with safeguards designed to prevent it from answering queries on topics like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry, where the company has publicly worried about its potential impact to "uplift" malicious actors. Anthropic says Fable 5 operates on the "same underlying model" as Mythos 5, which is coming out of its monthslong "Mythos Preview" period today, but only for "a small group of cyberdefenders" judged trustworthy through the existing Project Glasswing . Unlike Mythos 5, though, the publicly accessible Fable 5 is designed to funnel queries on certain sensitive topics to the earlier Claud
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 稱這些話題對其 Claude Fable 5 模型來說過於危險
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 週二公開發布了 Claude Fable 5，其第一個「Mythos 級別」模型，宣稱超越了之前的 Opus 模型，但該模型配有防護措施以防止其討論網絡安全、生物等話題。

articles.title: Google announces Gemini 3.5 Live Translate for instant voice-to-voice translation
articles.summary: Google has been chasing real-time translation for years, which it says has been one of its "pioneering machine learning experiments." We've seen numerous demos on stage at Google events in the past, but you needed Google phones, earbuds, or some other specific setup. Last year, Google brought real-time translation to more users in the Translate app, and now it's expanding availability more. With the release of Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, you'll have access to instant translation in more places and with lower latency than ever before. The new AI model is part of the version 3.5 family that launched at I/O . Before today, Google had only rolled out the Flash version, but we're expecting a Pro model to drop in the coming weeks. Gemini 3.5 Live Translate is a speech-to-speech model tuned to aut
articles.title_zh: Google 發佈 Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 實現即時語音翻譯
articles.summary_zh: Google 多年來一直在追求實時翻譯功能，並已在 Google 活動中展示過多次，最近推出了可供所有用戶使用的實時翻譯功能。

articles.title: NASA assigns crew for Artemis III, sets aggressive timeline for flying it
articles.summary: The US space agency unveiled the crew for its Artemis III mission on Tuesday during an enthusiastic event at Johnson Space Center in Houston. For this spaceflight into low-Earth orbit, which will see the Orion spacecraft rendezvous and dock with lunar lander prototypes, NASA chose an experienced, all-male crew with military backgrounds. They were revealed inside a darkened Teague Auditorium where hundreds of friends, family members, and NASA employees cheered enthusiastically. The four crew members are: Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: NASA 為 Artemis III 任務指派航天員，制定積極時間表
articles.summary_zh: 美國太空總署週二在休士頓詹森太空中心的活動上公布了 Artemis III 任務的航天員團隊，該任務將使 Orion 飛船與月球著陸器原型進行交匯與對接。

articles.title: Screwworms in US: Human risk is low—but they can burrow through your skull
articles.summary: Ravenous, flesh-eating flies have busted through containment barriers and have now reemerged in the US . On Monday and Tuesday, the US Department of Agriculture reported three new cases, bringing the tally to five. One of the cases is in a dog, though it's unclear where it became infected; the dog lives in New Mexico , had its infection reported in Texas, and may have recently traveled to Mexico , where the flies are also spreading. But the other four US cases were all in Texas—and all in calves— two in Zavala County and two in La Salle County . Almost all the attention over screwworm's resurgence has focused on the threat to livestock, like the calves and, in turn, the financial risk to the cattle industry. The fly's voracious, screw-shaped larvae can fell cattle if given the chance, and
articles.title_zh: 美國發現旋蠅：人類風險低，但可以鑽穿頭骨
articles.summary_zh: 凶悍的食肉蒼蠅已突破隔離屏障，在美國重新出現，美國農業部報告了五起案例，其中一起發生在狗身上。

articles.title: One day after discovery, Meta pulls facial recognition code from its smart glasses
articles.summary: One day after WIRED revealed that Meta had quietly embedded an unreleased face-recognition system into an app installed on more than 50 million phones, the company removed it, according to a WIRED analysis of the latest version’s code. The most recent version of Meta AI, a companion app for its line of smart glasses , strips out the unactivated software components that powered the system Meta internally called NameTag. The version published the day of WIRED’s report included several code libraries explicitly named for face recognition. Friday’s release includes none of them. Andy Stone, Meta's vice president of communications, told WIRED on Monday that the feature is purely exploratory, adding: “No final decision has been made on what to do here, if anything.” Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 發現一天後，Meta 從其智能眼鏡中撤下面部識別代碼
articles.summary_zh: 在 WIRED 披露 Meta 已在超過 5000 萬臺手機上的應用程式中悄悄嵌入了未發布的面部識別系統後一天，該公司將其移除。

articles.title: 攻擊者假冒IT支援人員，透過Microsoft Teams發動社交工程攻擊
articles.summary:
資安業者Palo Alto Networks旗下Unit 42指出，攻擊者利用Microsoft Teams等企業協作工具發動社交工程與網釣攻擊，藉由員工對內部溝通平臺的信任，假冒IT支援人員或服務供應商誘騙受害者。
研究人員舉例，攻擊者可能透過Teams傳送外部聊天邀請，聲稱使用者帳號出現異常，要求對方核准多因素驗證（MFA）請求，或依指示重設憑證。由於訊息出現在Teams而非電子郵件，員工可能降低戒心，因為即使系統顯示對方為外部使用者，仍可能接受對話並依指示操作。

articles.title: 行政院BTC預備會議聚焦AI生技和智慧醫療，再提FHIR Box打造全臺病歷互通
articles.summary:
行政院9日召開2026年生技產業策略諮議委員會（BTC）預備會議，由行政院政務委員吳誠文主持，邀集國內外BTC委員及11個部會代表，來盤點近年生技產業推動成果、討論未來發展方向。會議再次將AI、半導體、健康資料及智慧醫療列為重要發展主軸，也強調透過跨域整合加速醫藥研發、智慧醫療與健康服務創新。
吳誠文表示，政府推動生技產業應從民眾健康與福祉需求出發，結合臺灣在半導體、AI、資通訊、醫療服務及生技研發製造等領域的優勢，推動跨域合作，讓科技應用真正落地。他也提到，未來還需持續完善資料治理、法規制度、驗證服務及醫療場域導入機制，協助國產藥品、醫材與智慧醫療產品建立市場實績，並逐步推動國際認證互信。

articles.title: 歐盟網路韌性法案9月啟動漏洞與資安事件通報義務，Linux基金會示警全球軟體生態系準備不足
articles.summary: Linux基金會研究部門（Linux Foundation Research）與開放原始碼安全基金會（OpenSSF）於6月發布報告，指出全球軟體與開放原始碼生態系對歐盟網路韌性法案（Cyber Resilience Act，CRA）的認知與準備仍明顯不足。這項調查於2026年初進行，共有843名來自歐洲、北美、亞太等地區的軟體產業與開放原始碼相關人員參與。結果顯示，有66%受訪者表示不熟悉CRA。

articles.title: 微軟整合雲端防護與程式碼安全工具，協助企業依正式環境風險排序漏洞修補
articles.summary: 微軟在Build 2026揭露軟體安全布局，宣布兩大產品的原生整合正式推出，它們分別是雲端資安防護服務Microsoft Defender for Cloud，以及程式碼安全服務GitHub Code Security，讓企業能將正式環境中的風險資訊納入程式碼漏洞管理與修補流程。

articles.title: 蘋果Safari能自動變更外洩密碼、通知網站新動態、還能生成用戶想要的外掛
articles.summary: 在WWDC上，除了Siri AI，蘋果也宣布Safari新增功能，包含能自動變更密碼的代理人Passwords、及告知網頁新資訊的代理人Notify Me，以及讓用戶口說生成外掛的Describe an Extension及依主題組織分頁的新功能。

articles.title: SAP修補NetWeaver與Commerce重大漏洞
articles.summary: 6月9日SAP發布本月例行更新（Security Patch Day），總共修補15個資安漏洞，其中有4個是重大等級的漏洞CVE-2026-44748、CVE-2026-27671、CVE-2026-22732、CVE-2026-40128，格外引起矚目。
articles.title_zh: SAP修補NetWeaver與Commerce重大漏洞
articles.summary_zh: SAP於6月9日發布例行安全更新，修補15個資安漏洞，其中4個為重大等級的CVE漏洞。

articles.title: Meta證實有2萬個Instagram帳號因Meta AI漏洞被盜，時間長達1.5個月
articles.summary: Meta本週證實Meta AI支援工具存在一項漏洞，讓駭客得以在AI助理協助下，盜走Instagram（IG）帳號，估計從4月中到5月，超過2萬用戶受害。

articles.title: 【臺灣資安大會直擊】沙場點兵，數位備戰：臺灣為何必須走入國際網路攻防演練
articles.summary:
年底的某個深夜，一組臺灣資安人員正盯著螢幕，試圖在模擬的虛擬國度「Amber Falls」裡，把一座剛剛遭駭客癱瘓的水力發電廠重新喚醒。場地在立陶宛，情境是假的，壓力卻是真實的——因為在這場名為「琥珀之霧（Amber Mist）」的國際網路安全演習裡，一旦電力系統恢復失敗，現場的電腦螢幕就會真正熄滅，整個防守隊伍接下來幾個小時將無計可施，只能坐在黑暗中復盤錯誤。
這不是電影場景，而是現代國家網路防禦訓練的縮影。
在網路攻擊日益成為國家安全核心威脅的今天，傳統的資訊安全考試、證照訓練甚至奪旗競賽（CTF），已不足以回應真實戰場的複雜度。更全面、更逼近現實的訓練模式——「網路安全演習」——正在全球悄然崛起，並逐漸成為衡量國家數位防禦準備度的重要指標。

articles.title: 研究人員揭露新的Microsoft Defender零時差漏洞RoguePlanet
articles.summary: 研究人員Chaotic Eclipse（Nightmare-Eclipse）因對於微軟漏洞通報流程不滿，於4月、5月公布多個零時差漏洞，並在微軟通報漏洞的帳號與GitHub遭到停用後，揚言將在7月14日採取行動，威脅要讓微軟「粉身碎骨」。如今傳出該名研究員在微軟發布6月例行更新（Patch Tuesday）不久，又公布新的零時差漏洞。
articles.title_zh: 研究人員揭露新的Microsoft Defender零時差漏洞RoguePlanet

articles.title: Miasma蠕蟲原始碼外洩，供應鏈攻擊工具包現身GitHub
articles.summary: 專注於開源軟體供應鏈安全的資安業者SafeDep周二（6/9）警告，近來搞得人心惶惶的供應鏈蠕蟲Miasma透過遭入侵的開發者帳號出現在GitHub上，等同於把這套攻擊工具公開化。SafeDep取得其中一份已遭下架的原始碼後分析指出，Miasma不只是蠕蟲，而是一套完整的供應鏈攻擊工具包。

articles.title: Veeam修補Backup & Replication備份軟體重大漏洞，未修補可能導致備份伺服器遭受遠端程式碼攻擊
articles.summary: 備份與資料保護軟體廠商Veeam日前發布資安公告，揭露旗下備份軟體產品Veeam Backup & Replication 12.x版重大漏洞，可能導致已通過身分驗證的網域用戶，在備份伺服器上執行遠端程式碼。由於備份伺服器通常掌握企業資料備份與復原權限，相關漏洞可能成為攻擊者的重要目標，建議用戶儘速更新。

articles.title: 幫助具身機器人巡檢兼顧隱私，帝濶智慧科技展示PriviSphere Robotics平臺
articles.summary:
隨著AI應用爆發，如何在數據採集與隱私保護之間取得平衡，已成為科技演進的關鍵課題。專注於差分隱私技術、資料去識別化的帝濶智慧科技（DeCloak），於Computex 2026現場揭示最新隱私防護技術發展。
現場展示人員指出，前幾年帝濶智慧DeCloak Vision的影像去識別化能力，已經在醫療與長照場域展現價值，能將監控影像中的人物即時模糊化，遮蔽具備身分辨識特徵的原始影像；同時，後端AI仍能精準辨識跌倒、下床等動態行為，在不侵犯隱私的前提下，於固定式場景確保護理安全。
articles.title_zh: 幫助具身機器人巡檢兼顧隱私，帝濶智慧科技展示PriviSphere Robotics平臺
articles.summary_zh:
隨著AI應用爆發，如何在數據採集與隱私保護之間取得平衡，已成為科技演進的關鍵課題。專注於差分隱私技術、資料去識別化的帝濶智慧科技（DeCloak），於Computex 2026現場揭示最新隱私防護技術發展。
現場展示人員指出，前幾年帝濶智慧DeCloak Vision的影像去識別化能力，已經在醫療與長照場域展現價值，能將監控影像中的人物即時模糊化，遮蔽具備身分辨識特徵的原始影像；同時，後端AI仍能精準辨識跌倒、下床等動態行為，在不侵犯隱私的前提下，於固定式場景確保護理安全。

articles.title: Anthropic發表Claude Fable 5將Mythos威力公開，價格是Opus 4.8兩倍
articles.summary: 隔了近2個月，Anthropic昨（6/9）日正式發布威力等同Claude Mythos的模型Claude Fable 5，而且，加入安全防護以確保公眾安全，但其價格也是Opus 4.8的2倍。同時，Anthropic宣布推出少數專家及研究人員專用的最新版模型Mythos 5。
articles.title_zh: Anthropic發表Claude Fable 5將Mythos威力公開，價格是Opus 4.8兩倍
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic推出威力等同Claude Mythos的Claude Fable 5模型，加入安全防護措施，價格為Opus 4.8的2倍，同時推出Mythos 5供專家與研究人員使用。

articles.title: 微軟發布6月例行更新，破記錄修補逾560個漏洞
articles.summary: 6月9日微軟發布本月例行更新（Patch Tuesday），公開206個由該公司登記CVE編號的漏洞，數量明顯較過往都要來得多，若是加上該公司修補362個第三方登記CVE編號的漏洞，總數將達到568個，無論是微軟登記CVE的漏洞，還是修補第三方漏洞的數量，都創下史上最多的記錄。

articles.title: 科技1分鐘：記憶體解耦（Memory Disaggregation）
articles.summary: 過去伺服器多半將CPU、GPU與記憶體配置在同一台機器內。若某台伺服器的主記憶體（DRAM）不足，通常只能加裝模組或更換更高規格設備；同一資料中心內，其他伺服器即使有閒置記憶體，也不容易被即時調度使用...
articles.title_zh: 科技1分鐘：記憶體解耦（Memory Disaggregation）
articles.summary_zh: Memory Disaggregation技術將CPU、GPU與記憶體分離配置，使不同伺服器的閒置記憶體能被即時調度使用，提升資料中心整體資源利用效率。

articles.title: Intel's upcoming Z790 and Z990 flagship chipsets will reportedly consume up to 14W at peak load, courtesy of more PCIe 5.0 support — Nova Lake motherboards may feature a 22% smaller PCH than Z890
articles.summary: The Z990 PCH for Nova Lake motherboards is apparently 22% smaller than Z890, despite featuring a higher power maximum power draw of up to 14W. The leaked picture of the PCH shows a 11.15 x 6.5mm die and 25 x 24mm package, but we're unsure what motherboard it actually comes from.
articles.title_zh: Intel 即將推出的 Z790 和 Z990 旗艦晶片組據報將在峰值負載下消耗高達 14W——Nova Lake 主機板的 PCH 可能比 Z890 小 22%
articles.summary_zh: 用於 Nova Lake 主機板的 Z990 PCH 據稱比 Z890 小 22%，儘管峰值功耗最高可達 14W。洩露的 PCH 圖片顯示晶片尺寸為 11.15 x 6.5mm，封裝為 25 x 24mm，但來源主機板尚不確定。

articles.title: AMD fires back at Nvidia, claiming 256-core Zen 6 'Venice' CPU beats Vera by 3.3x in rack-level performance — company shares first estimated EPYC Venice benchmarks
articles.summary: AMD has shared the first official results for its 256-core EPYC Venice CPU, saying it beats Nvidia's Vera by 3.3x in a rack-level deployment.
articles.title_zh: AMD 反擊 Nvidia，聲稱 256 核心 Zen 6 'Venice' CPU 在機架級性能上勝過 Vera 3.3 倍——公司首次分享估計的 EPYC Venice 基準測試
articles.summary_zh: AMD 分享了其 256 核心 EPYC Venice CPU 的首批官方結果，聲稱在機架級部署中性能勝過 Nvidia Vera 3.3 倍。

articles.title: Google reportedly books Intel for packaging more than 3 million TPUs in 2028 — SK hynix is testing Intel's EMIB packaging for HBM integration
articles.summary: Google has placed an order for Intel to build more than 3 million of its TPUs in 2028 after months of testing Intel's advanced packaging.
articles.title_zh: Google 據報為 Intel 預訂 2028 年封裝逾 300 萬個 TPU——SK hynix 正測試 Intel 的 EMIB 封裝用於 HBM 整合
articles.summary_zh: Google 在多個月的測試後，委託 Intel 於 2028 年製造逾 300 萬個 TPU。

articles.title: Samsung Heavy Industries recruits Greek shipowner and Supermicro to bring 50MW floating AI data centers to market — can be powered by solid oxide fuel cells running on liquefied natural gas
articles.summary: Besides Samsung Heavy, Japan’s MOL is also building a 73 MW floating data center with Karpowership for a 2027 deployment.
articles.title_zh: Samsung Heavy Industries 聯合希臘船東和 Supermicro 推出 50MW 浮動 AI 資料中心——可由燃燒液化天然氣的固態氧化物燃料電池供電
articles.summary_zh: 除 Samsung Heavy 外，日本 MOL 也正與 Karpowership 合作建造一座 73 MW 浮動資料中心，預計 2027 年部署。

articles.title: Valve to discontinue physical Steam gift cards by the end of 2026 due to scammers — says nefarious actors continue to exploit them despite years of restrictions
articles.summary: Physical Steam gift cards will no longer be restocked at retail stores, though digital gifting options and existing cards will remain supported.
articles.title_zh: Valve 將於 2026 年底停止發行實體 Steam 禮品卡——表示惡意人士持續利用其進行詐騙，儘管已實施多年限制措施
articles.summary_zh: 實體 Steam 禮品卡將不再在零售店補貨，但數位贈送選項和現有卡片將繼續支援。

articles.title: Overenthusiastic GTA 6 fan claims to be monitoring oxygen levels, acoustic noise from the bushes at Rockstar North HQ — promises trailer 3 launch is imminent based on heightened activity
articles.summary: Either a dedicated jokester or a deranged fan has been posting advanced surveillance on Reddit in an attempt to predict the next GTA 6 trailer.
articles.title_zh: 過度狂熱的 GTA 6 粉絲聲稱監測 Rockstar North 總部灌木叢中的氧氣水平和聲學雜訊——基於活動增加承諾預告片 3 即將推出
articles.summary_zh: 一位敬業的開玩笑者或瘋狂粉絲一直在 Reddit 上發佈高級監控內容，試圖預測下一部 GTA 6 預告片。

articles.title: Analyzing TSMC's fab expansion roadmap — multi-fab N2 ramp, CoWoS, SoIC, and uncorking bottlenecks
articles.summary: TSMC is executing the largest manufacturing expansion in semiconductor industry history that combines simultaneous multi-fab N2 ramps, AI-driven manufacturing optimizations, and massive CoWoS/SoIC packaging capacity expansion to meet increasing demand for AI accelerators.
articles.title_zh: 分析 TSMC 晶圓廠擴展路線圖——多晶圓廠 N2 爬坡、CoWoS、SoIC 和消除瓶頸
articles.summary_zh: TSMC 正在執行半導體業史上最大規模的製造擴張，結合同步多晶圓廠 N2 爬坡、AI 驅動的製造優化和大規模 CoWoS/SoIC 封裝產能擴張以滿足日益增長的 AI 加速器需求。

articles.title: Grab an $800 saving on this RTX 5070 Ti gaming laptop from HP with customizable specs and a 20-core CPU — base model costs just $1,999 for 16-inch rig with 16GB DDR5, with OLED costing just $60 extra
articles.summary: Save $800 on this customizable RTX 5070 Ti HP Omen Max 16 gaming laptop with 16GB DDR5, 1TB SSD, and a 16-inch display.
articles.title_zh: HP RTX 5070 Ti 遊戲筆電省下 $800，配置可自訂且擁有 20 核心 CPU——16 吋機型基礎型號僅需 $1,999，含 16GB DDR5，OLED 版本僅需額外 $60
articles.summary_zh: 以 $1,999 的價格購買配有 RTX 5070 Ti、16GB DDR5、1TB SSD 和 16 吋螢幕的可自訂 HP Omen Max 16 遊戲筆電，即可節省 $800。

articles.title: Gigabyte's sensational RTX 5070 Ti Aorus Prime 5 gaming PC has had $500 slashed off the list price at Walmart —  32GB of DDR5 RAM, and 2TB of storage for just $1,999

articles.title_zh: 技嘉 RTX 5070 Ti Aorus Prime 5 遊戲電腦在 Walmart 大幅降價 $500——32GB DDR5 RAM 和 2TB 儲存空間，僅售 $1,999
articles.summary_zh: 搭載 16GB RTX 5070 Ti GPU 的高性能遊戲主機現在在 Walmart 大幅優惠 $500。

articles.title: China drafts $295 billion plan to build national AI data center grid running on 80% homemade silicon — projected 2028 timeline could run into limits of local chip production
articles.summary: China is drafting a plan to spend roughly 2 trillion yuan over five years on a nationwide grid of AI data centers.
articles.title_zh: 中國草擬 2950 億美元計畫建設國家 AI 資料中心網格，採用 80% 國産晶片——2028 年預計時程可能面臨本地晶片產量限制
articles.summary_zh: 中國草擬一項計畫，在五年內投入約 2 兆人民幣用於全國 AI 資料中心網格建設。

articles.title: 3D-printed nozzles could revolutionize drug and self-healing material manufacturing — MIT-developed triaxial electrospray design makes cleanroom fabrication optional
articles.summary: MIT's 3D-printed triaxial electrospray nozzles could revolutionize drug and self-healing material manufacturing. By using a relatively inexpensive resin printing approach, the new nozzle fabrication technique removes the need for a semiconductor-class cleanroom facility.

articles.title: Massive AI Storage Demand Creates a New Memory Wall
articles.summary: The term “Memory Wall” was coined in the early 1990s to describe a bottleneck in computer performance: the speed gap between processors and memory, specifically DRAM. The premise quickly insinuated

articles.title: Building Multi-Agent Systems For ASIC Flows
articles.summary: If one AI agent can solve a problem in a certain amount of time, can multiple agents solve it faster? The answer is yes, but only if the agents have well-defined roles and targets. This is where orchestrators fit in, and why they are so critical to agentic AI. Kexun Zhang, head of research at ChipAgents, talks about what exactly AI agents are, how they can be used to solve big problems that would require many experienced engineers, and how to parse a problem to maximize the effectiveness of those agents. The post Building Multi-Agent Systems For ASIC Flows appeared first on Semiconductor Engineering .
articles.title_zh: 為 ASIC 流程構建多智能體系統

articles.title: PCIe Benefits From AI, Despite Scaling Protocols
articles.summary: Key takeaways: PCIe remains a critical technology for non-AI processing. For AI, PCIe will be strengthened by scale-out, agentic AI, and even some scale-up. CXL is seeing uptake, and some even think it could participate in AI processing. PCIe has been the go-to network for most data traffic moving from a processor to devices located elsewhere, which is also what the new data-center AI scaling networks do. The existence of those new networks could be seen as suggesting that PCIe is inadequate to the task, but it turns out that, rather than being pushed out of the way in AI, a new focus on agentic and other novel AI guises is strengthening rather than weakening PCIe. CXL is closely related to PCIe and lies atop the PCIe stack. It’s had a slow start as developers evaluate its utility, and som
articles.title_zh: PCIe 受益於 AI，儘管擴展協議面臨挑戰

articles.title: CPO Will Dominate Scale-Up: Link Budgets For dB And $ Are Key
articles.summary: In the next five years, scale-up interconnects will transition from copper to optical interconnects — primarily co-packaged optics (CPO), with some near-packaged optics (NPO), and perhaps some vertical-cavitity-surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs). The demand for AI has become visibly real with Anthropic hitting a $47 billion annual run rate, followed closely by OpenAI and Google Gemini. Anthropic says its growth is limited not by demand but by compute capacity. So the pressure is on to get the most performance out of every GPU/XPU. Scale-up optical enables this with higher bandwidths and lower latencies, resulting in much higher utilization and performance for every GPU/XPU. In a few years, compute racks will look something like the mock-up below. All high-bandwidth interconnects will be yell
articles.title_zh: CPO 將主導橫向擴展：連結預算的 dB 和 $ 是關鍵

articles.summary: Credit: Kaitlyn Cimino / Android Authority TL;DR Galaxy Watch owners are reporting an issue with Google Play Services. The users claim that the app is severely draining their batteries. The issue appears to be affecting multiple Galaxy Watch models. One of the most annoying problems for any device is having an app that’s draining your battery. In most cases, you can handle a power-hungry app by restricting its background activity or uninstalling it. But what if that app is responsible for the core functions of your device? Unfortunately, it appears that some Galaxy Watch owners are facing this problem. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Reader survey suggests modern smartphones still don’t have enough battery life
articles.summary: It’s 2026. We’ve already witnessed the rise of electric cars, robots that can dance like Michael Jackson (and then trip over stairs), and AI products that can effectively build other AI products. However, somehow, I’m still keeping an eye on that little battery indicator on my devices. We never quite addressed the problem of ever-depleting energy, and given the processing demands and display capabilities of our flagship phones, battery life is now more important than ever. Granted, not every device has gone backward in this regard. The OnePlus Nord 6 , for instance, packs a 9,000 mAh battery that offers such an energy surplus that it can power up other devices you own. My colleague Dhruv wrote about his appreciation for the freedom such a device offers, especially the freedom from the “col
articles.title_zh: 讀者調查顯示現代智慧型手機的電池續航時間仍然不足
articles.summary_zh: 儘管電動車和 AI 技術已取得重大進展，但智慧型手機的電池續航問題依然未解決。

articles.title: 15 years later, the PS2 gets a Minecraft port, and it actually hits 30fps
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR A prodigy developer just ported Minecraft Pocket Edition onto the Sony PlayStation 2. Miecraft was never officially released for PS2, and previous ports either required hardware mods or were coded from scratch. This port, named OptiCraft, can also run on PS2 emulators for other platforms, including Windows and Android. The Sony PlayStation 2 and Minecraft have something in common: they are the best-selling properties in their respective categories. Let me explain. The PS2 is the highest-selling gaming console of all time, with more than 160 million units estimated to be sold. That’s about 1.5 times the PS4, and a little short of two times the PS5’s lifetime sales. Minecraft, on the other hand, is the most-sold non-arcade video game of all tim
articles.title_zh: 15 年後，PS2 終於迎來 Minecraft 移植版本，且能達到 30fps
articles.summary_zh: 開發者將 Minecraft Pocket Edition 移植到 Sony PlayStation 2，命名為 OptiCraft，能以 30fps 運行。

articles.title: Struggling to find PC games that run well on your phone? GameNative has a cool solution.
articles.summary: Credit: Hadlee Simons / Android Authority TL;DR GameNative will soon let you filter your PC game library to find the titles most likely to work on your Android device. The app will let you filter games by user-generated compatibility ratings, whether they’re playable, and whether they work on your GPU. This means you don’t necessarily have to install a PC game to find out if it works on your device. There are a few apps that let you effectively emulate PC games on your Android device, and GameNative is arguably the best of the bunch right now. One major challenge across all these apps is that you often have to install a PC game to see if it works. However, the team behind GameNative is working on a nifty solution. The GameNative X account showcased upcoming tweaks that will give you a bett
articles.title_zh: 苦於找不到能在手機上流暢運行的 PC 遊戲？GameNative 提供聰明解決方案
articles.summary_zh: GameNative 應用將允許用戶篩選 PC 遊戲庫，查找最可能在 Android 設備上運行的遊戲。

articles.title: Roborock’s latest smart mower could be the closest thing to hands-free lawn care yet
articles.summary: TL;DR Roborock has launched the RockNeo Q110H in the US, a robotic lawnmower that uses RTK navigation, visual mapping, and stereo vision to mow around obstacles and navigate challenging yards. An upcoming AI-powered mapping update will automate setup, allowing the mower to learn lawn boundaries and optimize its routes with minimal manual input. Priced at $1,299 ($1,169 at launch), the mower includes app controls, rain detection, multi-zone scheduling, and optional anti-theft tracking for a more hands-off lawn care experience. Roborock is expanding its lineup of home robotics products in the US with the launch of the new RockNeo Q110H robotic lawnmower. At the heart of this lawnmower is a navigation system that combines RTK positioning with visual mapping, enabling the mower to maintain its
articles.title_zh: Roborock 最新智慧割草機可能是無手操作草坪護理的最佳選擇
articles.summary_zh: Roborock 推出 RockNeo Q110H 割草機，採用 RTK 導航、視覺映射和立體視覺技術，AI 地圖更新將實現自動設置。

articles.title: Smartphones are finally getting Nvidia DLSS-style tech — and I’m ready for the ‘fake frames’
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority There’s no escaping AI technologies these days, and when computer giant NVIDIA attempts to blend this hugely lucrative future with its gaming legacy, controversy soon follows. Its latest DLSS 5 technology is a prime example, not only building on its AI-infused frame generation and upscaling tech, but also generating its own “photoreal” pixels to replace original textures and lighting. Where the PC and console industries lead, smartphones soon follow. It won’t be long before more and more smartphone games start using AI-assisted features to improve performance and image quality, like frame generation and upscaling. I’m skeptical but intrigued.
articles.title_zh: 智慧型手機終於迎來 Nvidia DLSS 風格的技術 — 我已為「虛擬幀」做好準備
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia DLSS 5 技術將把 AI 與遊戲相融合，在智慧型手機上實現類似遊戲主機的幀數提升功能。

articles.title: Insta360’s latest camera takes a shot at DJI’s dual-lens Osmo Pocket 4P
articles.summary: TL;DR Insta360 has launched the Luna Ultra pocket vlogging camera with dual cameras. It comes with a detachable touchscreen, quad mics, 8K 30fps video recording support, and more. It’s priced at $769.99 in the US. Insta360 is popularly known for its series of action cameras, wireless mics , gimbals, and the Antigravity A1 drone. Now, the company is entering the portable vlogging camera market. Insta360 has today announced the new Luna Ultra: the company’s flagship gimbal camera co-developed with Leica. It aims to compete directly against DJI’s Osmo Pocket 4P — that is, once DJI actually launches it.
articles.title_zh: Insta360 最新相機挑戰 DJI Osmo Pocket 4P 的雙鏡頭地位
articles.summary_zh: Insta360 推出 Luna Ultra 口袋型 vlogging 相機，具備雙鏡頭、可拆卸觸控螢幕、四麥克風和 8K 30fps 錄影功能，售價 $769.99。

articles.title: Google TV Streamer update unlocks a major hidden upgrade for your smart home setup
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority TL;DR Google has rolled out the UTTK.260317.003 build for the Google TV Streamer, marking its first major OTA update of 2026 and upgrading it to the April 2026 security patch level. The update quietly brings Thread 1.4 support to the device. A new “Share Thread network credentials” setting allows users to generate a secure local QR code on their TV screen, eliminating the frustrating process of connecting third-party devices. Google is finally giving the Google TV Streamer some long-overdue attention. After sitting on a stale October 2025 build for more than half a year, the streaming box is receiving its first major OTA of 2026. As spotted by 9to5Google , the 219MB UTTK.260317.003 build updates the Google TV Streamer’s system to the April 2026 se
articles.title_zh: Google TV Streamer 更新解鎖智慧家居設置的重大隱藏升級
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出 Google TV Streamer 首個主要 OTA 更新，帶來 Thread 1.4 支援和 2026 年 4 月安全修補程式。

articles.title: Gemini not working for you? You’re not alone (Updated)
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Gemini users have reported that the service is experiencing issues right now. The issues seem to have started after 6:00 AM ET. It looks like the problems aren’t affecting everyone, though, as some of us are able to access Gemini just fine. Update, June 10, 2026 (11:50AM ET): Gemini users are still running intro trouble, and Google has now acknowledged the errors on its support dashboard . The root cause is still under investigation, and there are not yet any known mitigation steps affected users can try. Google promises to share an update on its progress later today.
articles.title_zh: Gemini 對你無法正常運作？你不是唯一的受害者
articles.summary_zh: Gemini 用戶反映服務出現故障，故障似乎從美東時間早上 6 點開始，但並未影響所有用戶。

articles.title: Watch Duty app now supports flood tracking across the US
articles.summary: TL;DR Watch Duty is adding flood-tracking support in the US. It will present data from official warnings, precipitation information, and river gauges in an easy-to-understand format. Popular wildfire alert and tracking app Watch Duty is now introducing support for tracking floods, the non-profit announced in a blog post . While flood warning systems exist, they can be difficult for most people to find and understand. Warnings often get issued by the National Weather Service, FEMA, NOAA, and other US agencies, which can be difficult to keep up with.
articles.title_zh: Watch Duty 應用現已支援美國全境洪水追蹤
articles.summary_zh: Watch Duty 新增洪水追蹤功能，整合官方警告、降水資料和河流水位資訊，以易於理解的格式呈現。

articles.title: INIU’s graduation sale makes the Pocket Rocket P50 the perfect gift
articles.summary: Credit: INIU Having your phone battery die at the worst possible time can be horrifying. Whether you’re using maps to navigate, stuck on a long commute on a delayed train, or trying to kill hours at the airport before a flight, a charged phone is essential. A power bank is the most obvious fix, but they aren’t always the easiest to carry around. The typical high-capacity power bank is a chunky grey brick. While the looks don’t necessarily matter, the extra pocket or backpack space does. These are the problems INIU solves with the Pocket Rocket P50 . It’s one of the smallest 10,000mAh 45W power banks you can buy, and it looks pretty great too. Here’s what you need to know.
articles.title_zh: INIU 畢業季特賣讓 Pocket Rocket P50 成為完美禮物
articles.summary_zh: INIU 推出行動電源特賣活動，Pocket Rocket P50 因其便攜性和可靠性成為理想禮物選擇。

articles.title: I wish Galaxy phones had this new privacy feature, but Google might nix it
articles.summary: Credit: Paul Jones / Android Authority TL;DR HONOR has announced a nifty virtual permissions feature for its phones in China. This feature sends blank data to select apps that request your contact list, calendar, and other permissions. Realme had a similar feature in global markets, but we’ve discovered the company may have killed this feature to keep Google happy. Google and Samsung phones offer plenty of privacy and security features. This includes spam detection, call screening, Advanced Protection Mode, and the ability to block USB connections via a locked phone. However, HONOR has launched a new feature that I’d like to see on Pixel and Galaxy phones. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 我希望 Galaxy 手機擁有這項新隱私功能，但 Google 可能會否決它
articles.summary_zh: Honor 為中國市場推出虛擬權限功能，可向要求聯絡人等權限的應用發送空白數據。

articles.title: Hackers used Meta AI to expose over 34,000 Instagram accounts, but Meta isn’t slowing down
articles.summary: TL;DR A reported flaw in Meta’s AI support system affected 34,000 Instagram accounts, exposing personal data and enabling account takeovers. Attackers tricked an AI chatbot into changing account recovery emails, allowing them to reset passwords. Meta is reviewing the incident and notifying affected users, but has paused only the specific recovery tool involved while continuing its broader AI push. A few days ago, we reported on how Meta’s growing reliance on AI-powered support tools had seemingly opened the door to a new kind of security problem. Now, a fresh report from The New York Times suggests the issue may have been far more widespread than initially understood, affecting around 34,000 Instagram users. Of those, roughly 20,000 accounts were allegedly compromised, exposing personal in
articles.title_zh: 駭客利用 Meta AI 暴露超過 34,000 個 Instagram 帳戶，但 Meta 並未減速
articles.summary_zh: Meta AI 支持系統存在漏洞，導致 34,000 個 Instagram 帳戶泄露個人數據，駭客藉此實施帳戶接管攻擊。

articles.title: As a Google Pixel user, Apple’s iOS 27 update makes me incredibly jealous
articles.summary: I’m not an Apple guy, but there are some Apple products I use. I love my M5 MacBook Air, and I loved using my 2020 iPad Pro until I got a Galaxy Tab S10 Plus . Even so, I don’t rave about Apple as others do, and there are plenty of things about the company I don’t like at all. Even so, I have to commend Apple for what it is doing with iOS 27. This update isn’t solely focused on adding new features. In addition to the shiny new things, Apple has made performance and bug fixes a priority, and I wish Google would do the same with Android, especially on Pixel phones.
articles.title_zh: 作為 Google Pixel 用戶，Apple iOS 27 更新讓我非常嫉妒
articles.summary_zh: Apple iOS 27 更新帶來令人印象深刻的功能，即使是 Pixel 用戶也為之羨慕。

articles.title: Budget Linux or premium Android? TRIMUI’s upcoming Brick handheld lineup gives you two options
articles.summary: TL;DR TRIMUI is releasing two new successors to last year’s Brick handheld: the Linux-based Brick Pro and the higher-end Android-based Brick Hammer Pro U. Pricing and availability details haven’t been revealed yet. The premium Brick Hammer Pro U features a CNC-machined aluminum body, a Snapdragon G2 Gen 1 processor, hall-effect joysticks, and USB-C video output. The lower-end Brick Pro seems on track to target a budget price point by retaining the Allwinner A133P processor, 1GB of RAM, and 8GB of internal storage. TRIMUI has long been expected to launch a new Brick Pro handheld to succeed the well-received TRIMUI Brick from last year. The company is finally revealing more details about its new gaming handhelds, and it’s actually not one but two of them coming to us soon. TRIMUI has posted
articles.title_zh: 預算型 Linux 或高端 Android？TRIMUI 即將推出的 Brick 掌上遊戲機系列提供兩種選擇
articles.summary_zh: TRIMUI 推出兩款新掌上遊戲機：Linux 版 Brick Pro 和高端 Android 版 Brick Hammer Pro U。

articles.title: Hot: Sony’s WH-1000XM5 are down to $150, their lowest price ever
articles.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Sony’s last-gen premium headphones, WH-1000XM5, are down to just $230, their lowest price yet. If you’re lucky, you might even find them for as little as $150. This specific variant doesn’t come with a hard case, but you can get one for just $10 more. Sony’s recently launched luxury headphones, the 1000X “Collexion, ” look truly appealing, that is, until you realize they cost as much as a new Pixel 10. If you don’t want the bling and pizzazz, and can settle for audio that’s great, but not tuned-by-professional-music-composer great, Sony’s current flagship WH-1000XM6 should be great for you, except they, too, cost north of $400. But what if you could get similar features for less than half the price? That’s the current appeal for Sony’s last-g
articles.title_zh: 熱賣：Sony WH-1000XM5 降至 $150，創歷史新低
articles.summary_zh: Sony 上一代旗艦耳機 WH-1000XM5 降至 $230，部分情況下甚至可找到 $150 的價格。

articles.title: ChatGPT was caught recommending fake scam stores
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR ChatGPT shopping results have been linked to fake stores, exposing some users to financial fraud and stolen payment details. Scammers exploited the disappearance of Russell & Bromley as an independent retailer by creating convincing copycat websites. Researchers suspect “AI poisoning” is helping fraudulent pages infiltrate large language models and appear in recommendations. AI shopping assistants promise to make buying products easier , but a growing wave of fraud shows they can sometimes bring whole new risks. The Guardian has reported that there have been instances where ChatGPT has led users to convincing fake retail websites and even suggested products that were never real. According to findings shared by scam-detection service Ask
articles.title_zh: ChatGPT 被曝推薦虛假詐騙商店
articles.summary_zh: ChatGPT 購物結果被關聯到虛假商店，用戶面臨財務詐騙和支付資訊被盜風險。

articles.title: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 could get a much bigger battery
articles.summary: TL;DR The upcoming Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 could feature a much bigger, 784mAh battery compared to the Galaxy Watch Ultra. Paired with the Snapdragon Wear Elite SoC, this could mean a huge improvement in battery life. The 40mm Galaxy Watch 9 could also get a bigger battery than its predecessor. Samsung is expected to launch new Galaxy Watches soon, and the leaks are gathering speed. The watches have already been spotted in regulatory filings , and we also found codenames likely referring to the watches late last month. Now, a new report has given us fresh insight into the battery sizes for the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and the Watch 9. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 可能採用更大電池
articles.summary_zh: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 預計將搭載 784mAh 電池，搭配 Snapdragon Wear Elite SoC，可大幅提升續航時間。

articles.title: One device, double the coverage – The Botslab W101 window camera covers the inside and outside
articles.summary: Home security systems are a necessity, but how easily you can set one up depends on your situation. If you’re renting, you likely won’t be able to drill holes in the wall. And if you’re looking for both indoor and outdoor security, that might mean double the devices and twice the expenses. Not to mention the multiple power sources, apps, and video feeds you’ll also have to manage. The Botslab W101 Window Camera is a wireless window camera system that makes all of this easier. It attaches directly to any window pane using a mounting sticker, so you don’t have to worry about drilling or any modifications. And it uses two separate lenses to simultaneously capture footage both inside and outside your home. Whether you live in an apartment, a house, a motorhome, or anywhere else, it gives you h
articles.title_zh: 一台設備，雙倍覆蓋 – Botslab W101 窗戶攝像機涵蓋室內和室外
articles.summary_zh: Botslab W101 窗戶攝像機可同時監控室內和室外，為租房者和尋求雙重安保的用戶提供經濟型解決方案。

articles.title: Google is playing a dangerous game by killing off the Nest Mini
articles.summary: It’s rare that a tech product is so affordable that it becomes an impulse buy, but that’s exactly what the Google Nest Mini was for the better part of a decade. The tiny smart speaker launched as the Google Home Mini in 2017, was later rebranded to Nest Mini, and got a second-generation successor in 2019. Google largely left the Nest Mini untouched, although that wasn’t much of a problem. The smart speaker continued to serve its purpose as an affordable smart speaker with passable sound and Google Assistant (later Gemini) help . I’ve purchased a few Nest Mini speakers over the years, and I’ve never paid more than $30 for one. Once, I got one for free when I bought a Nest Hub display. That’s the spirit of the Nest Mini in a nutshell. It’s an accessible entry point into the Google Home ecosy
articles.title_zh: Google 通過淘汰 Nest Mini 正在玩危險遊戲
articles.summary_zh: Google Nest Mini 作為廉價智慧音箱的代表，面臨被淘汰的命運，這對用戶和市場造成影響。

articles.title: Gemini Canvas helped Paris Hilton turn an idea into an app, and she didn’t write a line of code
articles.summary: TL;DR Paris Hilton used Gemini Canvas to build a custom productivity app called Iconic Ideas using only a few prompts. The app organizes ideas and tasks, rewards completed goals with sparkle points. Google’s Gemini Canvas highlights how AI is making app creation more accessible, allowing users to build personalized tools through natural-language prompts. For many people, Paris Hilton is still synonymous with the pink-clad socialite persona that dominated the early internet era. But according to a recent Google blog post , there’s another side to Hilton that most people don’t see: a genuine fascination with technology and creative tools. Google recently welcomed Hilton as Android’s first “icon-in-residence,” where she got hands-on with Gemini and its most intriguing feature, Canvas.
articles.title_zh: Gemini Canvas 幫助 Paris Hilton 將想法轉化為應用程式，她沒寫過一行代碼
articles.summary_zh: Paris Hilton 使用 Gemini Canvas 僅通過幾個提示詞創建名為 Iconic Ideas 的生產力應用，展示 AI 如何使應用開發民主化。

articles.title: Meta now wants to use your activity from other websites to personalize its AI
articles.summary: TL;DR Meta will soon start using your activity outside its apps to personalize your home feeds and interactions with its AI chatbot. You can choose to disable personalization, but it will not stop Meta from collecting your data. The changes will start rolling out next month in the US and several other countries. Meta will soon start using your data from other businesses to personalize your feed and its AI responses to your queries. The company announced in a blog post that it’s changing how it uses data shared by businesses (via Neowin ). Right now, Meta uses your activity on third-party apps and services to show you more relevant ads on its platforms. While that in itself is something many users dislike , the company will now also use this data to personalize your feed and AI chats.
articles.title_zh: Meta 現在想利用你在其他網站上的活動來個性化其 AI
articles.summary_zh: Meta 將利用用戶在其應用外的活動來個性化首頁推送和 AI 聊天機器人交互，用戶可選擇禁用個性化但無法停止數據收集。

articles.title: Buying a burner phone in the US could soon become much harder
articles.summary: TL;DR The FCC wants carriers to collect personal details, including government-issued ID numbers and physical addresses, before activating or renewing phone service. Privacy advocates warn the proposal could make anonymous “burner” phones harder to obtain, affecting whistleblowers, domestic violence survivors, and others. While the FCC says the move could help fight scams and robocalls, critics argue it would increase privacy and cybersecurity risks. The days of buying a prepaid phone plan with minimal paperwork could eventually come to an end in the United States. The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has proposed new rules that would require wireless providers to collect significantly more personal information from customers before activating or renewing service. If adopted, the ch
articles.title_zh: 在美國購買一次性手機可能很快變得困難得多
articles.summary_zh: FCC 提議要求運營商在激活或更新手機服務前收集個人身份證號和地址，隱私倡導者警告此舉將使一次性手機更難獲得。

articles.title: Firefox is offering unlimited VPN usage for the entire summer
articles.summary: TL;DR Mozilla is removing the 50GB bandwidth cap from Firefox VPN for the summer. From now through August 31, users will get unlimited VPN usage in Firefox. It’s also increasing the number of accessible countries to 28. Firefox offers many useful features, including a kill switch for AI features and a built-in VPN for privacy. And now, Mozilla is making the Firefox VPN even better for its users. In a new blog post , Mozilla announced that it’s removing bandwidth limits from the Firefox VPN tool for the entire summer. Firefox fans can use the VPN as much as they like from today until August 31.
articles.title_zh: Firefox 提供整個夏天的無限 VPN 使用
articles.summary_zh: Mozilla 整個夏季移除 Firefox VPN 的 50GB 頻寬限制，提供無限使用，並增加至 28 個可用國家。

articles.title: Verizon confirms Wear OS 7 update is on the way for these Pixel Watches
articles.summary: TL;DR Verizon has updated its support pages with details about the Wear OS 7 update for Pixel Watch 4, Pixel Watch 3, and Pixel Watch 2. It states the update will come with the June security patch. Google hasn’t announced a rollout, but it’s likely that the update is coming soon. Google’s Wear OS 7 announcement at I/O 2026 held promises of better battery life , “Live Updates,” and more. And if you’ve been sitting in anticipation for the update to hit your Pixel Watch, you might not have to wait too long. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Verizon 確認 Wear OS 7 更新將推送至這些 Pixel Watch
articles.summary_zh: Verizon 更新支持頁面，確認 Pixel Watch 4、Pixel Watch 3 和 Pixel Watch 2 將獲得 Wear OS 7 更新及 6 月安全修補。

articles.title: European Commission forces Meta to accept third-party chatbots in WhatsApp for free
articles.summary: Back in November of last year, Meta banned third-party chatbots in WhatsApp, but of course the company has its own one built right in. The EU authorities have taken issue with this, and the European Commission (EC) specifically has now ordered Meta to restore access to "rival general-purpose AI assistants" in WhatsApp for free, and maintain it until the end of the EC's antitrust investigation into the original move by Meta to ban them. The Commission's press release says this will "prevent serious and irreparable harm to competition in this growing market by Meta's conduct, which at first...
articles.title_zh: 歐盟委員會強制 Meta 在 WhatsApp 中免費接受第三方聊天機器人
articles.summary_zh: 歐盟委員會命令 Meta 恢復 WhatsApp 中第三方 AI 助手的訪問權限，以對抗 Meta 獨家控制市場的行為。

articles.title: Counterpoint: shipments of MediaTek and Qualcomm chipsets decline
articles.summary: The skyrocketing costs of memory chips are changing the product mix of smartphone makers – cheaper, lower-margin phones aren’t selling so well, while pricier, high-performance models have bigger margins that helped them to absorb the blow. All of this has had an effect on the chipset market for smartphones, reports Counterpoint. MediaTek remains the largest vendor, though its market share has declined from 38% in Q1 2025 to 32% in Q1 this year. MediaTek’s strong presence in the entry-level and mid-tier segments is being undermined by the reduced smartphone sales in those...
articles.title_zh: Counterpoint：MediaTek 和 Qualcomm 晶片組出貨量下降
articles.summary_zh: 記憶體晶片成本上升改變了智慧型手機製造商的產品組合，低端手機銷售放緩，高端機型因高邊際利潤而表現更佳。

articles.title: Wear OS 7 rollout may be around the corner, hints Verizon Pixel Watch support page
articles.summary: Google's Wear OS 7 update for Pixel smartwatches could be just around the corner, if recent changes to official Verizon Pixel Watch support pages are any indication. The folks over at Droid-Life spotted the updated support pages for the Pixel Watch 2, Pixel Watch 3, and Pixel Watch 4 on Verizon's website, which confirm the Wear OS 7 update for these smartwatches could be arriving soon. Pixel Watch 4 According to the changelog listed on the support pages, the update will include the June 2026 security patch and carry the version number CP2A.260603.001. Curiously, the pages...
articles.title_zh: Wear OS 7 推出可能近在咫尺，Verizon Pixel Watch 支持頁面暗示
articles.summary_zh: 根據 Verizon 支持頁面的更新，Google Wear OS 7 對 Pixel Watch 的更新可能即將推出。

articles.title: New details about Huawei's non-folding wide-screen phone surface
articles.summary: A rumor from earlier this year claimed that Huawei was working on a candybar smartphone featuring a 16:9 or 16:10 display, similar in design to the Pura X. A new leak has now revealed additional information about the alleged device. In a now-edited Weibo post, tipster Digital Chat Station shared the key specifications of Huawei's upcoming wide-screen, non-folding smartphone. Huawei Pura X According to the leak, the device will be powered by a Kirin 9-series chipset and could pack a battery with a capacity of 7,000mAh or more. For photography, the handset is tipped to feature a...
articles.title_zh: 華為非摺疊寬螢幕手機的新細節浮出水面
articles.summary_zh: 華為正開發一款採用 16:9 或 16:10 顯示比例的直板智慧型手機，新洩露信息提供了額外設計細節。

articles.title: Honor confirms that the Magic series will get 7 years of OS updates and security patches

In the meantime, the company wanted to confirm that it and other Magic-series models will receive 7 years of OS updates and security patches in the EU and the UK. This is not a new development – last year the company committed to the 7-year update window for all Magic devices. Meanwhile, more affordable phones like the number series are getting 6 years of support. Honor Magic V6 (in Red) Honor has cool new...

articles.title: The Realme P4R launches with an 8,000mAh battery and an affordable price
articles.summary: Back in January, the Realme P4 Power made a splash with its 10,001mAh battery. Since then, there have been multiple P4 models that offered various combinations of battery capacity, chipset performance, camera and display quality. Now there is a brand new member. The Realme P4R has an 8,000mAh battery, the second largest in the series after the P4 Power. It is a Si/C battery with relatively fast 45W charging (including with PPS). Realme advertises that on a single charge, the P4R can last up to 12 hours of gaming, up to 61 hours of calls or up to 169 hours of music playback. The Realme...

The Xiaomi 17T comes in violet, blue, and black colors in India with two memory options - 12GB/256GB and 12GB/512GB, priced at INR59,999 ($630/€545) and INR64,999 ($682/€590), respectively. [#InlinePriceWidget,14652,1#] The Xiaomi 17T is powered by the Dimensity 8500 Ultra chip, boots Android 16-based HyperOS 3, and packs a 6.59" 1,268p 120Hz AMOLED display. articles.title: Telegram announces native app for the Apple Watch
articles.summary: Telegram has introduced a fully new native app for the Apple Watch. The release comes years after the messaging platform discontinued its original watchOS app, bringing dedicated smartwatch support back to the platform. In an X post, Telegram CEO Pavel Durov announced the messaging client's return to the Apple Watch. The new Telegram app for Apple Watch offers text and voice messages support. It also allows users to share GIFs, watch videos, share location, and stickers. The app also lets users access all their conversations and contacts. After installing the app on an Apple...

According to SamMobile, the Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 will be fueled by a battery with a rated capacity of 784 mAh, which could be advertised as having a typical capacity of 800 mAh. articles.title: Now available: Amazon EC2 M9g and M9gd instances powered by new AWS Graviton5 processors
articles.summary: AWS Graviton processors have improved steadily across generations, with each iteration delivering advances in compute performance, price-performance, and energy efficiency. At re:Invent 2025, we announced Amazon EC2 M9g, the first Graviton5-powered instances, in preview. Since then, customers have tested M9g across a wide range of workloads and shared their results. ClickHouse saw a 36% performance boost compared to M8g, with zero code changes. Honeycomb achieved 36% better throughput per core compared to Graviton4, across a 6-month A/B test of production observability workloads.  HubSpot deployed M9g for MySQL databases and saw query duration drop by up to 60%. Today, M9g instances are generally available, alongside the new M9gd instances for customers who need high-speed, low-latenc
articles.title_zh: 現已推出：由全新 AWS Graviton5 處理器驅動的 Amazon EC2 M9g 和 M9gd 執行個體
articles.summary_zh: AWS Graviton 處理器在各代產品中持續改進，每次迭代都在運算效能、性價比和能源效率方面帶來進步。在 re:Invent 2025 上，AWS 宣布了首款 Graviton5 驅動的 Amazon EC2 M9g 執行個體的預覽版本。

articles.title: Fable 5: Guardrails and burn rate are annoying users, who say it’s still better than Opus 4.8
articles.summary: On Tuesday, Anthropic debuted Fable 5 , the first — and much-anticipated — generally available Mythos-class model.  Anthropic says it can work autonomously for longer than other Claude models and also boasts enhanced memory capabilities and better programming skills for complex tasks.  Early community conversations suggest the new model is top-notch; some users are raising eyebrows over the short usage window, rather conservative guardrails, and not-optional data retention policy.  Fable 5 price: It’s good, but it’ll cost you  Fable 5 knocks benchmarks out of the park. But you don’t get something for nothing, at least not for very long.  Fable 5 is now available for those with Claude Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based enterprise subsc
